content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are precisely matched to the AoA path for this concern. Turn 2 refuses to debate the selfish/not-selfish question and instead reaches for the want — exactly the find-the-want-behind-the-should move. When the client tries to relitigate the verdict in turn 3, the coach in turn 4 doesn't argue the case but reflects the live phrase ('I miss myself a little') and opens it. Turn 6 names the linguistic-caveat read in real time and drops to somatic ('what does it feel like in your body'), correctly sequencing feeling before story. Turn 8 holds the sadness rather than rushing to reframe — the coach earns the depth instead of skipping to the generous-want conclusion. Turn 10 catches the inherited-voice/childhood-imprinting moment and offers a gentle redirect to address the lost self. Turn 12 is a clean 'stay there' hold at exactly the moment the client surfaces the real fear, allowing the breakthrough in turn 13. The coach never issues a verdict, never jumps to compassion-for-partner, never prescribes the spiritual-want conclusion — the client arrives there herself.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the selfish/not-selfish frame and pivots to the want — textbook find-the-want-behind-the-should."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the alive phrase and opens it with a question about the lost self; doesn't argue the verdict the client tried to reassert."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the linguistic caveat the client just noticed and drops into somatic — correct sequencing (feeling before story)."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites client to stay with sadness without explanation — holds the feeling rather than racing to reframe."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Touches the inherited-voice/childhood-imprinting briefly without making it the whole content; opens a generative direction."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Minimal, well-timed 'stay there' — holds the moment the real fear surfaces, letting the client find the answer herself."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "The 'what if you acted exactly how you want' question wasn't strictly needed — the client arrived at the integrated want organically. Move sparseness was a strength here."
}
